Version 0.2.11+5c68bf78719a1a597242e2dca194af4c05bcfabb
Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile -f device-code
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile -s 
https://management.azure.com/.default
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile -s api://my-api/.default
    entra-auth-cli get-token --no-clipboard

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    get-token          Generate an Microsoft EntraID access token  
    refresh            Refresh an existing token                   
    inspect <TOKEN>    Inspect and decode a JWT token              
    discover           Discover Microsoft EntraID app registrations
    config             Manage authentication profiles

Version 0.2.11+5c68bf78719a1a597242e2dca194af4c05bcfabb
Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Manage authentication profiles

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli config [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli config edit -p myprofile
    entra-auth-cli config delete -p myprofile
    entra-auth-cli config export -p myprofile --include-secrets
    entra-auth-cli config export -p myprofile -o profile.enc
    entra-auth-cli config import -i profile.enc

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list      List all profiles       
    create    Create a new profile    
    edit      Edit an existing profile
    delete    Delete a profile        
    export    Export a profile        
    import    Import a profile

Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Discover Microsoft EntraID app registrations

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli discover [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli discover -t contoso.onmicrosoft.com
    entra-auth-cli discover -t contoso.onmicrosoft.com -s MyApp*
    entra-auth-cli discover -s *Test*

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                Prints help information                           
    -v, --version             Prints version information                        
    -t, --tenant <TENANT>     Tenant ID to search in                            
    -s, --search <PATTERN>    Search pattern with wildcard support (e.g.,       
                              'MyApp*', '*Test*')

Version 0.2.11+5c68bf78719a1a597242e2dca194af4c05bcfabb
Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Generate an Microsoft EntraID access token

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli get-token [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile -f device-code
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile -s 
https://management.azure.com/.default
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile -s api://my-api/.default
    entra-auth-cli get-token --no-clipboard
    entra-auth-cli get-token -p myprofile --no-display

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                     Prints help information                      
    -v, --version                  Prints version information                   
    -p, --profile <PROFILE>        Profile name to use for authentication       
    -f, --flow <FLOW>              OAuth2 flow: interactive, device-code,       
                                   client-credentials, authorization-code       
        --no-clipboard             Do not copy token to clipboard               
        --no-display               Do not print the token to the terminal       
                                   (useful for shared screens or CI)            
        --redirect-uri <URI>       Custom redirect URI (overrides profile       
                                   setting)                                     
        --port <PORT>              Port for localhost redirect (default: 8080,  
                                   fallback: 5000, then random)                 
        --cache-cert-password      Use cached certificate password if available 
        --warn-expiry <MINUTES>    Warn if cached token expires within specified
                                   minutes (default: 5)                         
    -s, --scope <SCOPE>            Override scope(s) for this request           
                                   (comma-separated). Examples:                 
                                   'https://graph.microsoft.com/.default',      
                                   'api://myapi/access'

DESCRIPTION:
Inspect and decode a JWT token

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli inspect <TOKEN> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli inspect eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGci...

ARGUMENTS:
    <TOKEN>    JWT token to inspect (or '-' to read from stdin)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

Version 0.2.11+5c68bf78719a1a597242e2dca194af4c05bcfabb
Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Inspect and decode a JWT token

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli inspect <TOKEN> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli inspect eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGci...

ARGUMENTS:
    <TOKEN>    JWT token to inspect (or '-' to read from stdin)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

Version 0.2.11+5c68bf78719a1a597242e2dca194af4c05bcfabb
Created by Garrard Kitchen (garrardkitchen@gmail.com)

DESCRIPTION:
Refresh an existing token

USAGE:
    entra-auth-cli refresh [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    entra-auth-cli refresh -p myprofile

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information          
    -v, --version              Prints version information       
    -p, --profile <PROFILE>    Profile name to refresh token for
